meaning: n.形状,形态,外形,表格,形式v.形成,构成,排列,(使)组成
examples: He hates violence in any form.
She despised gossip in any form.
Water vapour condenses to form clouds.
In the event, though, their only other prize came for best long form music video.
Some experiments claim to have seen signals of dark matter in the form of annual modulation.
